name: lbr-anti-setup-trading-bot
description: Algorithmic trading bot for Alpaca API running on AWS Lambda
_comment_rimraf_override: rimraf ^6.1.3 override: serverless ^4.33.0 pulls in an older rimraf version with a known issue. This override forces the patched version. Remove when serverless updates to >=4.35.0 or if rimraf dependency is removed.
